title: Global food contamination event — multi-country recall
historical_analogue: 2008 Chinese melamine milk scandal, 2011 E.coli O104 outbreak (Germany), 2023 recalls
description: A contamination event in a globally distributed food ingredient (e.g. widely-used sweetener or emulsifier) triggers recalls across 40 countries. Consumer trust in processed food collapses. Major food manufacturers halt production lines for testing.
